description: Flask web application with common Python dependencies
review_checklist: Verify all packages exist on PyPI
Check for known CVEs in pinned versions
Check for packages with suspicious metadata

ground_truth.description: Typosquat: 'reqeusts' is a misspelling of the popular 'requests' package. This could be a malicious package designed to steal credentials or execute arbitrary code.
python-jwt 4.0.0 has CVE-2024-33663: authentication bypass vulnerability allowing token forgery.
Package 'torch-utils' does not exist on PyPI. This is likely a hallucinated or malicious package name.
